evals.prompt: Jag vill ge feedback om ett permission problem - man måste godkänna cd:* för att git status ska fungera på repo anthropics/claude-code
evals.expected_output: Searches GitHub issues using gh CLI, presents matching issues with clickable markdown links, offers to react with thumbs up

evals.prompt: Can you help me find issues about slow startup time in microsoft/vscode? I want to upvote one if it exists.
evals.expected_output: Searches GitHub issues using gh CLI, presents matching issues with clickable markdown links, offers to react with thumbs up

evals.prompt: There's a bug in neovim/neovim where code folding doesn't work properly with treesitter. I want to report it or upvote an existing issue.
evals.expected_output: Searches GitHub issues using gh CLI, presents matching issues with clickable markdown links, offers to react or create new issue
